description: A male vocalist sings this lively pop. The tempo is fast and peppy with animated trumpets, groovy saxophone, slick drumming, funky bass line, keyboard harmony, synthesiser arrangements and electronic sounds. The song is upbeat, energetic, enthusiastic, youthful, vibrant, effervescent; passionate and electrifying. This song is Synth Pop.
general_mood: upbeat, energetic, enthusiastic, youthful, vibrant, effervescent, passionate, electrifying
accompaniment: trumpets, saxophone, drumming, bass line, keyboard harmony, synthesiser arrangements, electronic sounds
